## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`cargo test --workspace`)
- [ ] Lints pass (`cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] Format checked (`cargo fmt --workspace -- --check`)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
